title: Basic Test Structure
description: Learn to organize tests using describe blocks, hooks, and best practices
objectives: Use describe blocks to group tests
instructions:
Write a Playwright test suite that:
1. Groups related tests in describe blocks
2. Uses beforeEach hook for setup
3. Uses afterEach hook for cleanup
4. Demonstrates proper test isolation
5. Uses descriptive test names

starterCode.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect
import pytest

# TODO: Create a test class for todo tests

    # TODO: Add setup fixture
    
    # TODO: Test 1: Add a todo
    
    # TODO: Test 2: Complete a todo
    
    # TODO: Test 3: Delete a todo

solution.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect
import pytest

class TestTodoApplication:
    
    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    def setup(self, page: Page):
        page.goto('https://demo.playwright.dev/todomvc')
        yield
        page.close()
    
    def test_should_add_new_todo(self, page: Page):
        input_field = page.get_by_placeholder('What needs to be done?')
        input_field.fill('Learn Playwright')
        input_field.press('Enter')
        expect(page.get_by_text('Learn Playwright')).to_be_visible()
    
    def test_should_complete_todo(self, page: Page):
        input_field = page.get_by_placeholder('What needs to be done?')
        input_field.fill('Complete this task')
        input_field.press('Enter')
        
        todo = page.locator('.todo-list li')
        todo.locator('.toggle').check()
        expect(todo).to_have_class(re.compile('completed'))
    
    def test_should_delete_todo(self, page: Page):
        input_field = page.get_by_placeholder('What needs to be done?')
        input_field.fill('Delete this task')
        input_field.press('Enter')
        
        todo = page.locator('.todo-list li')
        todo.hover()
        todo.locator('.destroy').click()
        expect(todo).not_to_be_visible()

hints: Use test.describe() to group related tests
beforeEach runs before every test in the group
afterEach runs after every test completes
Each test should be independent and isolated
Use descriptive test names starting with 'should'
Keep setup code DRY using hooks

testCases.name: Tests are grouped properly
testCases.expectedBehavior: Tests are in a describe block

testCases.name: All tests pass
testCases.expectedBehavior: All three todo tests execute successfully
